sequence.question: Why does the Mona Lisa have no eyebrows?
What physical condition did Beethoven have when he composed his Ninth Symphony?
What did ancient Greeks believe different musical modes could do to people?
What did Odin sacrifice to gain wisdom from the Well of Wisdom?
In Japanese New Year food tradition, why do shrimp symbolize longevity?
What saved the Eiffel Tower from being demolished in 1909?
What unusual weather event forced Mary Shelley indoors and helped inspire Frankenstein?
How did Aztecs originally consume chocolate?
Who operated the retractable shade covering of the ancient Roman Colosseum?
What was the subject of one of the first films shown to a paying audience, which reportedly caused viewers to panic?
How many time zones does Russia span?
Which famous human-made structure is often falsely claimed to be visible from space?
Approximately what percentage of all freshwater discharged into Earth's oceans comes from the Amazon River?
Which mountain is tallest when measured from its oceanic base to its summit?
Which desert is the world's largest hot desert?
What do tardigrades replace their cellular water with to survive extreme conditions?
What combination of properties makes honey resistant to spoilage?
Approximately how far would all the DNA in a human body stretch if uncoiled?
What are the underground fungal networks connecting forest trees sometimes called?
How many types of colour receptors does a mantis shrimp have?
